fn_def_list.fn_code:
static int
thumb_instruction_restores_sp (unsigned short insn)
{
  return (insn == 0x46bd  /* mov sp, r7 */
	  || (insn & 0xff80) == 0xb000  /* add sp, imm */
	  || (insn & 0xfe00) == 0xbc00);  /* pop <registers> */
}
